security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost data: https:; media-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.shortDescription: A local-first desktop music player with plugin support.
bundle.longDescription: MagpieMusicPlayer is a local-first desktop music player with local library management, playlists, configurable caches, lyrics and song info lookup, and a plugin system for user-authorized services.
